metadata.description: Contact PlaySupport for miniature painting, 3D print presupporting, commissions, pricing, or any questions. Reach us via email or the contact form.
metadata.ogDescription: Get in touch with PlaySupport for miniature painting, 3D print presupporting, commissions, and more.

ContactPage.title: Contact us
ContactPage.subtitle: You can also ask for a commission, pricing info, or any other question you have in mind at

metadata.title: Miniature Painting Service - PlaySupport
metadata.description: Professional miniature painting for wargaming, DnD, board games, and display pieces. Explore our painting tiers and pricing. Based in the EU.
metadata.ogDescription: Commission painting for miniatures: Warhammer, DnD, board games, and more. See our tiers and pricing.

PaintingPage.title: Miniature painting service
PaintingPage.intro: In our commission painting service, we paint all kinds of miniatures, from wargaming figures like Warhammer to Dungeons & Dragons, board games, and display pieces.
PaintingPage.tiersLead: Take a look at our painting tiers and pricing, the results and value speak for themselves!
PaintingPage.priceNote: Estimated miniature painting price ranges by category and painting tier. Exact quote depends on model complexity and requests.
PaintingPage.nonEu: Customer responsible for potential additional import fees and customs.
PaintingPage.eu: VAT free! No additional fees in Germany, Austria, Denmark, France, Netherlands, Belgium, etc.

steps.title: List your miniatures
steps.description: Provide a clear list of models, squads, or armies you want painted and whether you need them assembled, magnetized, or paint removed. We work with anything, from a single miniature to a large army commission.

steps.title: Tell us about your models
steps.description: Tell us if you want to send your miniatures to us, if you want us to get them for you, or if you want us to 3D print them for you with our high-quality resin printers.

steps.title: Select a painting tier
steps.description: Choose between Army, Hero, or Art tier for each miniature or squad. Army tier is perfect for larger squads, Hero tier is great for characters, and Art tier is for pieces that should truly stand out.

steps.title: Choose your paint scheme and basing style
steps.description: Let us know what paint scheme or style you want and your preferred base theme such as snow, desert, jungle, ruined city, etc.

levels.title: Army Tier
levels.text: Clean transitions and highlights for an awesome army.

levels.title: Hero Tier
levels.text: More attention to every detail with more advanced techniques.

levels.title: Art Tier
levels.text: Every surface has its own texture, every miniature a unique story.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: Careful manual support placement and island checking ensures the best print success rate possible.

items.title: Easy support removal
items.description: Despite the high reliability of our supports, they are easy to remove and do not leave large marks.

items.title: Hollowing large files
items.description: To make sure you do not waste resin and printer lifetime, we hollow your miniatures wherever appropriate.

items.quote: Everything is absolutely perfect and very professionally made. Their work is super efficient and the files work perfectly.
items.name: MiniScape Studio

items.quote: Always a pleasure working with PlaySupport! Perfect supports every time has us always coming back.
items.name: Eons of Battle
items.designation: YouTube channel and high quality miniature terrain for 3D printing

items.quote: PlaySupport's services were impeccable, creating beautiful minis that matched exactly what I hoped for.
items.name: Brian

SupportingPage.title: Miniature pre support service
SupportingPage.description1: We provide professional manual supports service for your warhammer-like, DnD or any other miniatures or 3D models, made with Lychee Plus software, allowing us to make optimal results for resin 3D printing.
SupportingPage.description2: Let us handle the creation of supports so you can focus your craft and make the best possible miniatures
SupportingPage.description3: You can download a free sample below to see the quality of our work.

Hero.intro: There is no worse fate for a hobby than it becoming a chore. Our lives are filled with enough obligations as it is. We are here to support you so that you can focus on playing.
Hero.item1: Getting your miniatures ready for the tabletop – painting, assembling, basing, magnetizing
Hero.item2: Supporting your 3D miniature files for resin 3D printing so they print properly every time

card1.suffix: based, magnetized and ready for gaming or display.

card2.suffix: with a high quality resin 3D printer.

card3.prefix: We paint all kinds of miniatures, from wargaming figures like
card3.suffix: board games, and beautiful display pieces.

card4.title: Flexible Pricing
card4.body: Different painting tiers to fit your budget and needs, all at above industry standard quality. Basing is included in price.

card5.title: Any Kind of Project
card5.body: A single display figure or a whole army, playsupport is here to make it happen!

SupportingHome.title: Resin 3D print pre supporting service
SupportingHome.item1: Reliable supports that won't fail you
SupportingHome.item2: Easy to remove with minimal support damage
SupportingHome.item3: Free troubleshooting and assistance if you need dialing in settings or have printer issues

ContactSection.title: Contact
ContactSection.subtitle: Ask for a miniature painting, resin 3d pre-supporting service or any question you have!

PaintingProcess2.heading: How to Order Your Miniatures
PaintingProcess2.intro: The process stays simple from first message to finished army. Follow the steps below and we will get back to you with a quote and timeline for your project.
PaintingProcess2.outro: And that's it! Once we get your message we will get back to you with a quote and timeline for your project along with any additional information we need.

steps.title: List your miniatures
steps.description:
Provide a clear list of models, squads, or armies you want painted and if you need them assembled, magnetized or if they need paint removal. 
We work with anything, from a small single miniature to a large army commision.

steps.title: Tell us about your models
steps.description: Tell us if you want to send your miniatures to us, if you want us to get them for you or if you'd like us to 3d print them for you with our high quality resin 3d printers.

steps.title: Select a painting tier
steps.description:
Choose between Army, Hero, or Art tier for each individual miniature or squad. 
Army tier is perfect for larger squads, Hero tier is great for characters and Art tier is here for pieces that you want to truly stand out.

steps.title: Choose your paint scheme and basing style
steps.description: Let us know what paint scheme or syle you want your miniatures painted in and your preferred base theme such as snow, desert, jungle, ruined city etc.
